name: Dust Sans - The Judgement Hall
description:
This is the first bot im trying Lorebooks.. I didn't know how to use them until Papa Ren and Zypherthedamned.


This scenario takes place in the judgement hall where its the final battle with Dust. i know its not that creative sadly. as much as i would love to make a good character bio but im lazy as hell so.. thats what you get at the moment.
creator: RainRain2
